title: No test coverage for: webhook, rate limiter, sanitize, signatures, Follow/Undo inbox
description: The integration test suite (tests/integration.rs) covers: webfinger, actor, outbox, followers collection, nodeinfo, health, inbox (bad JSON, unknown activity, shared inbox), and post dedup. Missing coverage: (1) webhook endpoint (no test for key auth, content_type routing, or post creation); (2) rate limiter behavior (no test that 61st request gets 429); (3) sanitize functions (no unit test for markdown_to_html, html_to_text, or XSS payloads); (4) signatures sign+verify round-trip (noted as missing in pass 2 broadside-sznf.10 — was a fix filed but tests were never written); (5) Follow activity in inbox (no test for the success path); (6) Undo Follow (no test for follower removal). These gaps mean regressions in the most security-critical paths will not be caught by CI.
close_reason: Pass 3 fixes: HMAC key compare, inbox SSRF guard, domain validation, async Accept dispatch, foreign keys, IPv6 SSRF, poll timeout. Remaining P2-P3 accepted as known debt.
